case_title: JASON ULIT ET AL VS. SWEET RENTALITY LLC

docket_entries.description: ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF ULIT, JASON DEL RIO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ULIT, JASON DEL RIO, MARIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC $1,135.50 PRINCIPAL, $90.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,225.50, DEFENDANT SHALL RETURN THE CLEANING FEE ($520); PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY ESTABLISHED THEY LEFT THE PROPERTY CLEANER THAN THEY TOOK IT. DEFENDANT SHALL RETURN THE BLINDS REMOVAL FEE ($350) BECAUSE PLAINTIFFS TOOK THE UNIT WITH THE BLINDS. DEFENDANT MAY RETURN THE COST OF FILLING HOLES IN THE WALLS. DEFENDANT SHALL REFUND HALF OF THE DRAPERY CLEANING COST; PLAINTIFF'S STORAGE OF THE DRAPES CAUSED MILDEW BUT CLEANING WOULD HAVE BEEN REQUIRED AFTER A SEVEN-YEAR TENANCY IN ANY EVENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ULIT, JASON DEL RIO, MARIA AS TO DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-04-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-04-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-04-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. PLAINTIFF JASON ULIT IS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF MARIA DEL RIO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY FATIMA WOODS, OWNER. DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY BRET SWEET OWNER. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-04-2018 - JUDGMENT.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (SEE SIGNATURE) SERVED OCT-12-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY DEFENDANT SWEET RENTALITY LLC
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2019 ORDERED DESTROYED
